title: Empanadas with Lardons and Malt
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, this recipe adds the savory flavor of lardons and the rich taste of malt to create a delightful snack or meal.
instructions: Cut the empanadas in half and set aside.
In a pan, cook the lardons over medium heat until browned.
Add the malt and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the silky and argentinian seasoning. Cook for 1 minute.
Place a spoonful of the lardon mixture onto each empanada half.
Fold the empanadas in half and press the edges to seal.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes.
